mapper.select: select u.user_id as userId, u.user_name as userName, u.nick_name as nickName, u.status as status, u.create_time as createTime, (select count(*) from jiedan_order o where o.customer_account collate utf8mb4_general_ci = u.user_name collate utf8mb4_general_ci) as projectCount, (select count(*) from jiedan_order o where o.customer_account collate utf8mb4_general_ci = u.user_name collate utf8mb4_general_ci and o.status not in ('done', 'cancelled')) as unfinishedCount from sys_user u join sys_user_role ur on ur.user_id = u.user_id join sys_role r on r.role_id = ur.role_id where r.role_key = 'customer' and u.del_flag = '0' order by u.user_id desc
mapper.update: update jiedan_order set customer_account = '' where customer_account collate utf8mb4_general_ci = convert(#{account} using utf8mb4) collate utf8mb4_general_ci
